fiveAnswersEvidenceRows.label: 4. Forensic samples were taken from the scene, including from the kerb area. The forensic report is awaited; laboratory turnaround extended due to backlogs (update as of 18 March 2024). This may assist with contact issues and the position of the victim at impact, subject to limitations of environmental staining.
fiveAnswersEvidenceRows.note: Outstanding on bundle — brief plan ledger.

fiveAnswersEvidenceRows.label: 6. Medical evidence: The victim was conveyed to Northshire General Hospital. Hospital records and a medical report have been requested from the treating team. Not yet served. The prosecution will rely on this to prove the injury and its seriousness (GBH).
fiveAnswersEvidenceRows.note: Outstanding on bundle — brief plan ledger.

fiveAnswersEvidenceRows.label: 7. Scene photos: Scene photographs were taken by the first attending officer at 00:35. They show the pavement, kerb, and blood. Retained by the force. To be disclosed as part of initial disclosure. Scene photos list to follow.
fiveAnswersEvidenceRows.note: Outstanding on bundle — brief plan ledger.

doNotOverstate: Do not import drugs continuity unless the papers support it.
Do not import ABE unless the papers support it.
Assumed position may conflict with interview or served evidence.
Medical evidence may support Crown causation if proved on served papers.
Do not state "CCTV confirms" — CCTV is not fully served on papers
Do not state "CCTV proves" — CCTV is not fully served on papers
Do not state "Full CCTV confirms" — CCTV is not fully served on papers
hardRules: Referred only does not mean usable.
Inference must be labelled as inference.
No line is sendable just because a source exists.
